markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy progress and align on future direction.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Early Gains:** Read.ai's LLM visibility is up to 11% (from \~0%) in 3 weeks, and organic traffic is showing week-over-week growth.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The content strategy will expand beyond "meeting notetaker" to cover "enterprise search" and "productivity," aligning with Read.ai's broader product vision.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [**Partner Conflict:** Read.ai flagged a strategic conflict: GrowthX's internal use of competitor tools (Fathom, Fireflies) undermines the partnership's credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [**Actionable Content:** Read.ai will provide unique Brazil-based survey data to GrowthX for use in new content, adding original, quotable statistics.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)

## Topics

### Phase 1 Progress & Benchmarks

  - [GrowthX reviewed progress after 3 weeks of publishing, benchmarking against a client who saw consistent week-over-week traffic growth after 3 months.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**Traffic Forecasts:** Projections are based on 90 target keywords and a 5-article/week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Limitation:** Forecasts are for organic search only (not LLMs) and are estimates, as articles often rank for more keywords than initially targeted.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Seasonal Impact:** Holiday traffic is currently lower across all GrowthX clients.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

### SEO vs. LLM Optimization

  - [**Dual Focus:** The strategy optimizes for both SEO and LLMs, as best practices are largely the same.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
      - [**Core Tactics:** Clear headlines, chunked paragraphs, TLDRs, and FAQ sections.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [**LLM-Specific:** Comprehensive topic clusters (e.g., productivity) establish authority, and original data (e.g., the "20% productivity improvement" stat) increases citation likelihood.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic Volatility:** LLM referral traffic (currently 3–5% of total organic) is less predictable than traditional SEO, as platform algorithms change (e.g., ChatGPT's citation policy shift in late 2023).](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)

### LLM Performance Tracking (Scrunch)

  - [The Scrunch dashboard tracks Read.ai's performance against competitors across 336 prompts and 7 LLM platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [**Current Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
      - [**Visibility:** 11% (up from \~0% in early Dec)](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
      - [**Citation Rate & Position:** Both have increased over the last 12 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [**Top 3:** Otter, Fireflies, Fathom.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [**Action:** Add Granola to the tracking list.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [**Prompt Strategy:** The current prompt list is meeting-centric. It must be expanded to cover new strategic areas like enterprise search and productivity.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Strategic Alignment & Partnership Feedback

  - [**Content Strategy Expansion:**](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [**Goal:** Shift brand perception beyond "meeting notetaker."](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [**Method:** Build authority via 8–9 new topic clusters (e.g., enterprise search, productivity) and persona-based content (e.g., sales, recruiting).](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [**Website Optimization (Phase 2):**](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
      - [GrowthX will advise on adding prominent CTAs to blog posts to improve conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Implementing this on Webflow will require experimentation, possibly using code blocks in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [**Partnership Conflict:**](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
      - [**Issue:** GrowthX's internal use of competitor tools (Fathom, Fireflies) undermines Read.ai's credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
      - [**Significance:** This is a high-level strategic concern for Read.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [Add Granola to the Scrunch competitor tracking list.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [Expand the Scrunch prompt list to cover new strategic areas (enterprise search, productivity).](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
      - [Pass Read.ai's feedback on competitor tool use to the internal IT and Ops teams.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [**Read.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
      - [Provide Brazil-based survey data to GrowthX for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
      - [Review website optimization opportunities in Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/JQXto-iM--ptFaLhcFnGuMSyNMxGGfam?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
